name: Dunkers 2
author: Poki
description: Get ready to dunk it in Dunkers 2! In this 1v1 basketball game, you have to build the ultimate Baller to win matches, tournaments and shootouts. Every match you win earns you coins to spend in the games shops. If you earn the most money out of all Ballers - you'll get to the top of the rankings! With the money you make in-game, you can buy packs to unlock new Ballers and cool new outfits. You can also try the Super Shootout, where you have to make increasingy difficult throws to earn great rewards! Can you create the ultimate Baller and become number 1? How to play Dunkers 2? Use A and D keys to move and jump! Hold spacebar untill the bar hits the orange marker to shoot the ball! Who created Dunkers 2? Dunkers 2 was created by Playback Studio. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Dunkers 2 for free? You can play Dunkers 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Dunkers 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Dunkers 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
